pipelineStages.label: Operational Export
pipelineStages.detail: Raw user_events CSV standing in for PostgreSQL OLTP data.

pipelineStages.label: ETL Transform
pipelineStages.detail: Session, page, and purchase fields normalized into analytics-ready features.

pipelineStages.label: Feature Matrix
pipelineStages.detail: Bias-adjusted feature vectors aligned for model-style scoring.

pipelineStages.label: Engagement Score
pipelineStages.detail: Weighted matrix math produces a per-user engagement ranking.

pipelineStages.label: Reverse ETL
pipelineStages.detail: Derived score becomes product-facing output for prioritization and targeting.
